title: Aghraz Sharah Kafia
author: Mufti Abu Owais Muhammad Yousaf Al-Qadri
notes: An Urdu explanation of Kafia that supports the study of Arabic grammar and classical Islamic texts.

title: Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum Urdu
author: Safiur Rahman Mubarakpuri
notes: An Urdu biography covering the life and mission of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.

title: Manzoor-ul-Zurori Sharah Mukhtasar-ul-Qudori
author: Abu Hamza Muhammad Manzoor Nizami
notes: An Urdu commentary on Mukhtasar al-Qudori covering Hanafi jurisprudence.

title: Sharah Hidayat-un-Nahw
author: Allama Muhammad Liaqat Ali Rizvi
notes: An Urdu explanation of Hidayat-un-Nahw for understanding Arabic grammar.

title: Sharah Noor-ul-Aizah
author: Allama Muhammad Liaqat Ali Rizvi
notes: An Urdu commentary covering important topics of Hanafi jurisprudence.
